skills.name: Horn Maestro
skills.description: Increases the effect duration of hunting horn melodies.

levels.description: Extends melody effect duration and increases health recovery.
Greatly increases the effect duration of hunting horn melodies.

skills.name: Paralysis Resistance
skills.description: Reduces the duration of paralysis.

levels.description: Reduces the duration of paralysis by 30%.
Reduces the duration of paralysis by 60%.
Prevents paralysis.

skills.name: Palico Rally
skills.description: Powers up Palicoes.

levels.description: Increases Palico attack power and defense by 5%.
Increases Palico attack power and defense by 10%.
Increases Palico attack power and defense by 15%.
Increases Palico attack power and defense by 20%.
Increases Palico attack power and defense by 25%.

skills.name: Effluvial Expert
skills.description: Nullifies or reduces environmental damage in the Rotten Vale.

levels.description: Nullifies damage from effluvia and reduces damage from acids.

skills.name: Paralysis Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of paralysis buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

levels.description: Paralysis buildup +5% Bonus: +10
Paralysis buildup +10% Bonus: +10
Paralysis buildup +20% Bonus: +10
Paralysis buildup +30% Bonus: +10

skills.name: Free Elem/Ammo Up
skills.description: Unlocks your weapon's hidden element. Also increases bowgun loading capacity. (There is a cap to loading capacity.)

levels.description: Draws out 33% of hidden element and expands clip size for some ammo.
Draws out 66% of hidden element and expands clip size for many ammo.
Draws out 100% of hidden element and expands clip size for most ammo.
